commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
from collections import Counter
from typing import List

from models import LogEntry


class ConsoleReport:

    def print_summary(self, entries: List[LogEntry], top: int = 20):
        total = len(entries)

        level_counter = Counter()
        error_counter = Counter()
        file_counter = Counter()

        for entry in entries:
            level_counter[entry.level] += 1
            error_counter[(entry.message, entry.file_name, entry.line)] += 1
            file_counter[entry.file_name] += 1

        print()
        print("========================================")
        print("Metrify Log Analyzer")
        print("========================================")
        print(f"Total eventos: {total}")
        print()

        print("----------------------------------------")
        print("Resumen por tipo")
        print("----------------------------------------")

        for level, count in level_counter.most_common():
            print(f"{level:<20} {count:>10}")

        print()
        print("----------------------------------------")
        print(f"Top {top} errores")
        print("----------------------------------------")

        for index, ((message, file_name, line), count) in enumerate(error_counter.most_common(top), start=1):
            print(f"{index}. {count}x")
            print(f"   {message}")
            print(f"   {file_name}:{line}")
            print()

        print("----------------------------------------")
        print(f"Top {top} archivos")
        print("----------------------------------------")

        for index, (file_name, count) in enumerate(file_counter.most_common(top), start=1):
            print(f"{index}. {count}x {file_name}")
